structured_payload_candidate.title: FC#1: Too Many Changes in Operating State
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Report fault condition with description 'Too many changes in Operating State' and possible diagnoses: unstable control due to poorly tuned loop or mechanical problem.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: FC #1 Equation ΔOS > ΔOS MAX Applies to OS #1 – #4 Description Too many changes in Operating State Possible Diagnosis Unstable control due to poorly tuned loop or mechanical problem

structured_payload_candidate.title: FC#4: Temperature Drop Across Inactive Cooling Coil
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Fan Coil Unit with RAT sensor and cooling only
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Fault condition when SAT_AVG - RAT ≥ sqrt(εRAT^2 + εSAT^2) + ΔTSF in OS#2.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Report fault condition with description 'Temperature drop across inactive cooling coil' and possible diagnoses including RAT/SAT sensor error, cooling coil valve leaking, DX cooling stuck on.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: FC#4 Equation SAT AVG – RAT ≥ √ƐRAT2+ ƐSAT2 + ΔTSF Applies to OS #2 (cooling only FCU with RAT) Description Temperature drop across inactive cooling coil Possible Diagnosis RAT sensor error SAT sensor error Cooling coil valve stuck open or leaking DX cooling stuck on

structured_payload_candidate.title: FC#5: Temperature Rise Across Inactive Heating Coil
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Fan Coil Unit with RAT sensor and heating only
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Fault condition when SAT_AVG - RAT ≤ -sqrt(εRAT^2 + εSAT^2) - ΔTSF in OS#2.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Report fault condition with description 'Temperature rise across inactive heating coil' and possible diagnoses including RAT/SAT sensor error, heating coil valve leaking, gas/electric heat stuck on.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: FC#5 Equation SAT AVG - RAT ≤ √ƐRAT2+ ƐSAT2 + ΔTSF Applies to OS #2 (heating only FCU with RAT) Description Temperature rise across inactive heating coil Possible Diagnosis RAT sensor error SAT sensor error Heating coil valve stuck open or leaking Gas or electric heat stuck on

structured_payload_candidate.title: Testing/Commissioning Overrides for Valves
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Provide software switches to force HW and CHW valves full open or full closed at plant level.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Provide software switches interlocked to CHW and hot-water plant level to force HW valve full open/closed and CHW valve full open/closed.
structured_payload_candidate.commissioning_check: force HW valve full open if there is a hot-water coil, force HW valve full closed if there is a hot-water coil, force CHW valve full open if there is a CHW coil, force CHW valve full closed if there is a CHW coil
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Provide software switches that interlock to a CHW and hot-water plant level to a. force HW valve full open if there is a hot-water coil, b. force HW valve full closed if there is a hot-water coil, c. force CHW valve full open if there is a CHW coil, and d. force CHW valve full closed if there is a CHW coil.

evidence_quote: Provide software switches that interlock to a CHW and hot-water plant level to a. force HW valve full open if there is a hot-water coil, b. force HW valve full closed if there is a hot-water coil, c. force CHW valve full open if there is a CHW coil, and d. force CHW valve full closed if there is a CHW coil.
evidence_text: Provide software switches that interlock to a CHW and hot-water plant level to a. force HW valve full open if there is a hot-water coil, b. force HW valve full closed if there is a hot-water coil, c. force CHW valve full open if there is a CHW coil, and d. force CHW valve full closed if there is a CHW coil.
